'''vanutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oikonym|oikonym]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oikonym|oikonym]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vanutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vænitith|vænitith]] || [[word:vænitij|vænitij]] || [[word:vænitish|vænitish]] || [[word:væniti|væniti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vanunututh|vanunututh]] || [[word:vanunutuj|vanunutuj]] || [[word:vanunutush|vanunutush]] || [[word:vanunutu|vanunutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanututh|vanututh]] || [[word:vanutuj|vanutuj]] || [[word:vanutush|vanutush]] || [[word:vanutu|vanutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanuftuth|vanuftuth]] || [[word:vanuftuj|vanuftuj]] || [[word:vanuftush|vanuftush]] || [[word:vanuftuf|vanuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanututhu|vanututhu]] || [[word:vanutuju|vanutuju]] || [[word:vanutushu|vanutushu]] || [[word:vanutuku|vanutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanututh|vanututh]] || [[word:vanutuj|vanutuj]] || [[word:vanutush|vanutush]] || [[word:vanutu|vanutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanututhul|vanututhul]] || [[word:vanutujul|vanutujul]] || [[word:vanutushul|vanutushul]] || [[word:vanutukul|vanutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanututhuthu|vanututhuthu]] || [[word:vanutujuju|vanutujuju]] || [[word:vanutushushu|vanutushushu]] || [[word:vanutuku|vanutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanututhun|vanututhun]] || [[word:vanutujun|vanutujun]] || [[word:vanutushun|vanutushun]] || [[word:vanutukun|vanutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanututhuoro|vanututhuoro]] || [[word:vanutujuoro|vanutujuoro]] || [[word:vanutushuoro|vanutushuoro]] || [[word:vanutukuoro|vanutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
